---
title: "Home"
---

# Semester Notes

Welcome to my semester notes website.

To run this website, open the terminal and run: `quarto preview`

Use the sidebar to navigate by module and week.

## Modules

-   Data Mining
-   Regression Analysis
-   Time Series

## How I’ll use this site

-   Weekly lecture notes
-   Lab practice and R examples
-   Revision summaries
-   Exam preparation notes
